_comment: Confirmed results only. Entries must match an authoritative source (TheSportsDB event ID, Cagematch URL in source field). Do not add invented results.

events.strDescriptionEN:
Street Fight
Finn Balor vs. JD McDonagh

Six Man Tornado Tag Team Match
Los Americanos Hermanos (Bruto Creedo & Julio Creedo) & The Original El Grande Americano vs. Los Americanos (Bravo Americano, El Grande Americano & Rayo Americano)

WWE Women's Tag Team Title Match
Brie Bella & Paige (c) vs. The Judgment Day (Raquel Rodriguez & Roxanne Perez) (w/Liv Morgan)

Singles Match
Seth Rollins vs. Austin Theory (w/Logan Paul)
events.strResult:
Street Fight
Finn Balor defeats JD McDonagh (14:15)

Six Man Tornado Tag Team Match
Los Americanos (Bravo Americano, El Grande Americano & Rayo Americano) defeat Los Americanos Hermanos (Bruto Creedo & Julio Creedo) & The Original El Grande Americano (10:45)

WWE Women's Tag Team Title Match
Brie Bella & Paige (c) defeat The Judgment Day (Raquel Rodriguez & Roxanne Perez) (w/Liv Morgan) (10:15)

Singles Match
Seth Rollins defeats Austin Theory (w/Logan Paul) (12:55)
